refnamediv.refpurpose: Tests if a geometry has no points of self-intersection or self-tangency.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Returns true if this Geometry has no anomalous geometric points, such as self-intersection or self-tangency. For more information on the OGC's definition of geometry simplicity and validity, refer to "Ensuring OpenGIS compliance of geometries"

note.para: SQL-MM defines the result of ST_IsSimple(NULL) to be 0, while PostGIS returns NULL.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
SELECT ST_IsSimple(ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON((1 2, 3 4, 5 6, 1 2))')); st_issimple ------------- f (1 row)
SELECT ST_IsSimple(ST_GeomFromText('LINESTRING(1 1,2 2,2 3.5,1 3,1 2,2 1)')); st_issimple ------------- f (1 row)
